case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK, VS. CAN SARIKURT ET AL

docket_entries.description: MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON OCT-19-2016 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT CAN SARIKURT'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
